task.summary: Default task
Added setup.py, altered pytest plotting to include a show()
tdma.pyx works (fast!)
pn junction works, mesh functions subclass ndarray
cleaned up Mesh more
qwhemt worked!
Mesh functions can handle >1d input, Fermi-Dirac allows multiple bands (unvalidated but no errors)
Schrodinger passes finite-potential well test from Li and Kuhn.
Self-consistent Schrodinger Poisson converges.
Before trying Sphinx
Set up Sphinx
Cleaned Schrodinger and Fermi-Dirac, wrote some Schrodinger comments.
Cleaned Schrodinger and Fermi-Dirac, wrote some Schrodinger comments.
testing html
Submeshing in Coupled SP is a hack, but it functions
Starting to expand to include all nitride (and thesis) related works in this project
to_unit in ParamDB
Wrote up which optical phonons scatter. About to make ParamDB support multiple unit systems...
ParamDB seems to support nanoelectronic units fine. Haven't tested poissolve...
ParamDB seems to support nanoelectronic units fine. Haven't tested poissolve...
ParamDB seems to support nanoelectronic units fine, and both 'devices.py' and 'schrodinger.py' generate reasonable looking output.
ParamDB seems to support nanoelectronic units fine, poissolve is a mess of broken linkages from the transition

MESSAGE.value: Added setup.py, altered pytest plotting to include a show()
pn junction works, mesh functions subclass ndarray
Mesh functions can handle >1d input, Fermi-Dirac allows multiple bands (unvalidated but no errors)
Schrodinger passes finite-potential well test from Li and Kuhn.
Cleaned Schrodinger and Fermi-Dirac, wrote some Schrodinger comments.
Submeshing in Coupled SP is a hack, but it functions
Starting to expand to include all nitride (and thesis) related works in this project
Wrote up which optical phonons scatter. About to make ParamDB support multiple unit systems...
ParamDB seems to support nanoelectronic units fine. Haven't tested poissolve...
ParamDB seems to support nanoelectronic units fine, and both 'devices.py' and 'schrodinger.py' generate reasonable looking output.
ParamDB seems to support nanoelectronic units fine, poissolve is a mess of broken linkages from the transition

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: ParamDB seems to support nanoelectronic units fine, poissolve is a mess of broken linkages from the transition
